raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Haney's bill, AB 1775, aims to allow licensed cannabis retailers to diversify their businesses.",
    "Cannabis lounges in California are currently prohibited from serving food or non-alcoholic beverages.",
    "The restrictions on cannabis lounges are described as arbitrary and misguided by Assemblymember Haney.",
    "The inability to serve non-cannabis items limits cannabis lounges from diversifying their business.",
    "A previous version of the bill, AB 374, was vetoed by Governor Newsom due to concerns over protections for cannabis workers.",
    "The reintroduced bill includes protections for cannabis lounge workers from secondhand smoke impacts at work.",
    "There is a demand for legal cannabis to be enjoyed in the company of others, alongside food and beverages.",
    "Assemblymember Haney argues that there is no economic, health, or safety reason to prohibit cannabis lounges from selling food and beverages."
  ]
}
```
